svg.text: Let staff practice without creating real transactions, inventory changes, or payment charges
When ON: purple banner will appear on all register screens
Training sessions are completely isolated from production data
Manager can toggle training mode without full settings access
Separate from manager PIN — share with trainers only
Clears all training orders when training mode ends
Last reset: May 26, 2026 at end of session
Trainees use their normal PIN — same RBAC applies
Cash drawer open (real hw, no log)
ⓘ Cash drawer physically opens during training — same hardware signal
but no entry is written to pos_cash_movements for training sessions
(training_session_id IS NOT NULL filters drawer events from EOD)
All training payments go to Stripe test environment — $0 real charges
Last session: May 26, 2026 — 2h 14min — Marcus, Jennifer, New Hire #3
LIVE PREVIEW — REGISTER WITH TRAINING MODE ACTIVE
This is what staff see on the register terminal when training mode is ON
⚡ TRAINING MODE ACTIVE — No real transactions. Stripe test mode. Data excluded from reports.
⚡ All items tagged with purple T — training session active. No inventory depleted.
TRAINING RECEIPT — NOT A REAL TRANSACTION
Do not present to customer — for training only
All reports: WHERE training_session_id IS NOT NULL excluded
Stripe: STRIPE_TEST_KEY used when training active
KDS: pos_kds_tickets with training flag → purple display
Inventory: Edge Function skips depletion for training orders
EOD: training orders excluded from Z-report calculations
Purge: DELETE WHERE training_session_id = X on session end
